# INFINI Gateway | The Best Open Source Golang Search-focused Gateway for Easysearch/Elasticsearch/OpenSearch

> AI-friendly index of site content.

Configuration Example #  A simple example is as follows:
flow: - …
- [set_request_header](https://docs.infinilabs.com/gateway/main/docs/references/filters/set_request_header/): set_request_header #  Description #  The set_request_header filter is used to set header information for requests.
Configuration Example #  A simple example is as follows:
flow: - name: …
- [set_request_query_args](https://docs.infinilabs.com/gateway/main/docs/references/filters/set_request_query_args/): set_request_query_args #  Description #  The set_request_query_args filter is used to set the QueryString parameter information used for requests.
Configuration Example #  A simple example is as …
- [set_response](https://docs.infinilabs.com/gateway/main/docs/references/filters/set_response/): set_response #  Description #  The set_response filter is used to set response information to be returned for requests.
Configuration Example #  A simple example is as follows:
flow: - name: …
- [set_response_header](https://docs.infinilabs.com/gateway/main/docs/references/filters/set_response_header/): set_response_header #  Description #  The set_response_header filter is used to set the header information used in responses.
Configuration Example #  A simple example is as follows:
flow: - name: …
- [sleep](https://docs.infinilabs.com/gateway/main/docs/references/filters/sleep/): sleep #  Description #  The sleep filter is used to add a fixed delay to requests to reduce the speed.
Configuration Example #  A simple example is as follows:
flow: - name: slow_query_logging_test …
- [smtp](https://docs.infinilabs.com/gateway/main/docs/references/processors/smtp/): smtp #  Description #  The SMTP processor is used to send emails, supporting both plain text and HTML emails. It supports template variables and allows attachments to be embedded in the email body. …
- [switch](https://docs.infinilabs.com/gateway/main/docs/references/filters/switch/): switch #  Description #  The switch filter is used to forward traffic to another flow along the requested path, to facilitate cross-cluster operations. No alternation is required for Elasticsearch …
- [translog](https://docs.infinilabs.com/gateway/main/docs/references/filters/translog/): translog #  Description #  The translog filter is used to save received requests to local files and compress them. It can record some or complete request logs for archiving and request replay. …

## Other Resources
- [Sitemap](https://docs.infinilabs.com/gateway/main/sitemap.xml): Full machine-readable sitemap.
- [RSS Feed](https://docs.infinilabs.com/gateway/main/index.xml): Latest updates and posts.
